Step 10.1 Inngest SDK install + import sanity check
====================================================

Installed: 2026-05-19

Pip diff:
  + inngest==0.5.18
  + jcs==0.2.1            (transitive — canonical JSON serializer)

No other packages affected; pydantic / httpx / pytest-asyncio already at compatible versions.

Key Inngest 0.5.18 exports (used by the V2 orchestrator):
  - Inngest                  client class
  - Context                  per-run context (event data + state)
  - Step                     durable step runner (.run / .send_event / .sleep)
  - Function                 decorator return type
  - NonRetriableError        skip-retry exception (CRITICAL for D-10.3 PermanentSTTError)
  - RetryAfterError          rate-limit-aware backoff
  - PydanticSerializer       for D-10.14 hybrid Pydantic/dict pattern
  - TriggerCron, Throttle, RateLimit, Concurrency, Cancel, Singleton

Inngest version detection: the SDK does NOT expose __version__ as a module attribute
in 0.5.18; pinned via pyproject.toml + verified at install time.

Import smoke test:
  >>> from inngest import Inngest, Context, Step, NonRetriableError
  >>> from inngest import PydanticSerializer, Function
  All imports succeed.
